description_long: This is a military-style SUV with a boxy, utilitarian design, painted in matte olive drab with white stenciled markings on the hood and sides. The vehicle features an open cabin with two front seats, a rear bench, and a visible spare tire mounted at the back. The windshield is upright and split, with a simple dashboard and a large steering wheel. The SUV has rugged, deep-treaded tires and exposed wheel arches, emphasizing its off-road capability. Metal rails and antennae are attached to the rear, and the vehicle lacks doors, providing easy access to the interior. The overall construction is robust, with visible bolts, hinges, and utilitarian details typical of mid-20th-century military vehicles.
description: A rugged, olive drab military SUV with an open cabin, spare tire at the rear, and white stenciled markings. It features exposed wheels, metal rails, and a utilitarian, doorless design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open cabin, two seats, dashboard, and rear-mounted spare tire with visible metal rails and antenna.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the upright split windshield, grille, headlights, and white star marking on the hood.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the spare tire, rear bench, and the open, doorless structure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the spare tire, rear bench, metal rails, and antennae, with the back of the seats and dashboard visible.
attribute_wheel_design: simple steel wheels with circular holes and rugged, deep-treaded tires
